summary: All four layers (backend, frontend, db, l1) passed with exit code 0 and analyzer confidence >=0.92. No critical/high findings; only info-level quality notes (first baseline recording, prompt cache opportunity) and a low-severity unused variable warning. Acceptance criteria for Consumer Lock (seq-1) are satisfied with no agent contradictions.
unresolved_questions: Dev-mode signature/TOTP skip is active in backend — confirm this is intentional for the test environment and not leaking into production config
No regression baseline existed prior to this run; subsequent runs should be compared against the newly recorded baseline to validate stability
